file.content:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [x] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [x] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [x] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [x] Filter state management with custom hook
- [x] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [x] URL state persistence for filters
- [x] Clear/reset filters functionality

## ✅ COMPLETED
**Status:** All filtering functionality implemented and integrated
**Files created:** 
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx  
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx
- src/components/filters/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts
**Integration:** Filters fully integrated with main page and visualizations

## ✅ COMPLETED: Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement side-by-side racquet comparison functionality with radar charts, detailed specifications, and performance analysis
**Files created:** 
- src/components/comparison/RacquetComparison.tsx
- src/components/comparison/RadarChart.tsx
- src/components/comparison/ComparisonTable.tsx
- src/components/comparison/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetComparison.ts

**Integration:** All comparison functionality integrated with main page and visualizations

## ✅ COMPLETED: Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement intelligent racquet recommendation system that analyzes user preferences and suggests similar racquets based on playing style and performance characteristics
**Files created:** 
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationEngine.tsx
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationCard.tsx
- src/components/recommendations/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRecommendations.ts
- src/lib/utils/recommendation-algorithm.ts

**Integration:** All recommendation functionality integrated with main page via tab navigation

## Current Task: Performance analytics dashboard with insights
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** Medium
**Description:** Create an analytics dashboard that provides insights into the racquet data, including statistical summaries, performance trends, and data quality metrics
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.tsx (new)
- src/components/analytics/StatsCard.tsx (new)
- src/components/analytics/TrendChart.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useAnalytics.ts (new)
- src/lib/utils/analytics-calculations.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Performance Analytics Dashboard with:
- Statistical summaries of racquet properties and ratings
- Performance trend visualizations
- Brand and category analysis
- Data quality and completeness metrics
- Interactive filtering and drill-down capabilities

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Statistical summary cards for key metrics
- [ ] Performance trend charts and visualizations
- [ ] Brand comparison analytics
- [ ] Data quality and completeness indicators
- [ ] Interactive filters for analytics views
- [ ] Analytics state management with custom hook

## Previous Task: ✅ Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully implemented the Performance Analytics Dashboard for the Tennis Racquet Explorer. Let me summarize what was accomplished:

## ✅ Performance Analytics Dashboard - COMPLETED

### Files Created:
1. **`src/lib/utils/analytics-calculations.ts`** - Comprehensive analytics calculation engine with statistical functions
2. **`src/lib/hooks/useAnalytics.ts`** - React hook for analytics state management and data processing
3. **`src/components/analytics/StatsCard.tsx`** - Reusable component for displaying statistical metrics
4. **`src/components/analytics/TrendChart.tsx`** - Interactive chart component for trend visualization
5. **`src/components/analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.tsx`** - Main dashboard component with tabs and filters
6. **`src/components/analytics/index.ts`** - Export index for analytics components

### Key Features Implemented:
- **Statistical Analysis**: Mean, median, standard deviation, percentiles for all performance metrics
- **Performance Insights**: Comprehensive breakdown of power, control, comfort, and other rating categories
- **Physical Specifications**: Analysis of weight, head size, flex, swingweight distributions
- **Brand Analytics**: Comparative analysis across tennis racquet brands
- **Data Quality Metrics**: Completeness scores and distribution analysis
- **Interactive Visualizations**: Bar charts, trend analysis, and statistical summaries
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-friendly layouts with touch interactions
- **Export Functionality**: JSON data export capability
- **Filter Integration**: Works seamlessly with existing racquet filters

### Integration:
- Added analytics tab to main navigation alongside Explore and Recommendations
- Fully integrated with existing data pipeline and filtering system
- Updated home page to feature analytics as a key capability

### Sprint 2 Status:
The analytics dashboard completes a major Sprint 2 deliverable, providing deep insights into racquet performance data, brand comparisons, and data quality metrics. The next task is to enhance user experience and mobile responsiveness across the application.

The analytics functionality is now live and accessible through the "Analytics" tab in the main navigation when users click "Explore Racquets Now".
